name: CertCard AI - DOT Medical Card Renewal Automation
concept: AI-powered DOT medical card renewal automation. Automatically schedules driver medical exams, retrieves digital medical cards from examiners, updates FMCSA/DOT systems, and maintains compliance records.

practice_blocking_urgency.type: Binary - Card expiration = driver out of service
practice_blocking_urgency.impact: Fleet operations disruption, route cancellations, DOT audit penalties $1K-10K per non-compliant driver

ai_advantage: Smart scheduling: ML optimizes exam scheduling around driver routes, minimizing time off
AME availability: NLP extracts real-time availability from medical examiner offices
Digital card retrieval: AI retrieves and digitizes medical cards from examiner systems
FMCSA integration: Auto-updates DOT systems (where API available)
competitive_advantage: Integration with major medical examiner EHR systems
